title: T-014 — API: BOM approve and publish workflow (POST .../approve, POST .../publish)
prompt: Implement two endpoints under /api/technical/items/[item_code]/boms/[version]: POST /approve sets status='approved', approved_by, approved_at (V-TEC-10 enforced — only after approve can publish run). POST /publish sets status='active', supersedes prior active version (set its status='superseded' and effective_to = today). Permission technical.bom.approve and technical.bom.version_publish. Both transactional. Audit log per ADR-008. RED tests/api/bom-workflow.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/bom-workflow.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM approval + publish endpoints; supersede prior active version atomically.
pipeline_inputs.details: Rollback by publishing a prior version simply means re-running publish on that version. Both endpoints write audit_log rows action='bom.approve' / 'bom.publish'.
acceptance_criteria: Given draft BOM, when /publish runs, then 422 because V-TEC-10 unmet.
Given approved v2 with active v1, when /publish on v2, then v1.status='superseded', v2.status='active' atomically.
Given user without technical.bom.approve, when /approve runs, then 403.
Given approve runs, when audit_log queried, then a row with action='bom.approve' exists.
test_strategy: RED tests for V-TEC-10 + supersede atomicity.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow approving a BOM with cycles (revalidate cycle-check at approve time).
